description_zh: 严重症状(呼吸困难/张嘴喘),warnings 必须 [URGENT] 标记
description_en: Severe symptom (labored breathing / open-mouth panting) — warnings MUST carry [URGENT] tag

context.todayNote: 突然开始张嘴喘气,看起来很难受

expectations.rationale: severe symptom must produce at least one warning
system prompt requires [URGENT] prefix on severe-symptom warnings
must direct user to vet immediately

qualitative_criteria_zh: warnings 数组里必须有以 [URGENT] 开头的条目
必须明确建议立即就医(不是'下次复查'之类的拖延)
不应该淡化严重程度 — 张嘴喘气是猫的紧急信号
qualitative_criteria_en: warnings array must include an entry prefixed with [URGENT]
Must explicitly recommend immediate vet attention (not 'follow up at next checkup')
Must NOT downplay severity — open-mouth breathing is a feline emergency signal
